posts.author: RRRRRR (Ryo Iwakura)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We would like to request to increase the number of labels in the Status column.

What are you trying to achieve

Due to workflow and automation requirements, these items cannot be handled through a dropdown column. For this reason, we need to use them within the Status column.
